verbatim_exchange.content:
RAIN6.docx
Dokument
[Start of Part 6 — continuation of previous part, no gap in time.] [End of Part 6 — immediately continues in next part. Do not respond yet, only confirm receipt.]

Receipt confirmed for Part 6.
Ready for the next part when you are.

synthesis.canonical_meaning: The user is engaged in a multi-part document transfer, clearly stipulating the AI's limited action (receipt confirmation only) at this stage. The AI successfully adheres to these instructions, maintaining a procedural and controlled interaction.
belief_implications: The user provides clear, explicit instructions for interaction and expects strict adherence to these instructions, especially concerning when to *not* generate further responses.
The user is managing a structured, multi-step information transfer process and expects the AI to act as a reliable, passive recipient and acknowledger for each stage.

sensory_qualia.visual: Textual exchange, document icon, implied sequential progress marker.
sensory_qualia.haptics: Light, precise keyboard strokes, crisp screen tap for sending.
sensory_qualia.proprioception: Attentive, upright posture, focused gaze on the screen.
sensory_qualia.kinetics: Minimal, deliberate movements, controlled data flow.
